description: Two-way Figma MCP: extract + verify design-to-code, or generate on-brand Figma pages from a prompt.
name: io.github.tathagat22/plumb-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Figma personal access token (read-only). Only needed for the REST path — not required when the Plumb plugin is paired in Figma desktop. Create one at figma.com → Settings → Security → Personal access tokens.
environmentVariables.name: FIGMA_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional label shown in the Plumb Figma plugin when multiple plumb-mcp servers are paired with the same plugin (multi-agent connect). Defaults to the basename of the current working directory.
environmentVariables.name: PLUMB_SESSION_NAME
